creator: amdmi3@amdmi3.ru
text:
Hi!

> http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.8-exp.20120127093941/lander-0.6.2.log
> http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.8-exp.20120127093941/openlierox-0.59.b9.log
> http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.8-exp.20120127093941/springlobby-0.130.log

Fixed.

> http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.8-exp.20120127093941/plee-the-bear-0.3.1_5.log

Updating this itself depends on boost update. I think I'll have it
ready to be updated right after new boost hits the tree.

> http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.8-exp.20120127093941/libYGP-0.9.42.log 
> http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.8-exp.20120127093941/galaxyhack-1.74_9.log 

Unmaintainerd, I've fixed both by defining BOOST_FILESYSTEM_VERSION.

> http://pointyhat.FreeBSD.org/errorlogs/amd64-errorlogs/a.8-exp.20120127093941/simgear-2.4.0.log 

graphics/osg update which is required to update simgear is ready:
http://people.freebsd.org/~amdmi3/osg.patch

-- 
Dmitry Marakasov   .   55B5 0596 FF1E 8D84 5F56  9510 D35A 80DD F9D2 F77D
